replies.msg:
salt bridge
喺兩個chemical half cell之間connect, 去complete一個circuit
最重要, salt bridge 上嘅ionic electrolyte, compensate 兩邊half cell cation 同anion, 令個cell run得耐啲
[model answer: to complete circuit; to provide electrolyte to balance charge on both half cell]

emulsification
1. detergents have wetting and emulsifying properties. Each detergent molecule contains a hydrophilic head and a hydrophobic tail.
2. like dissolves like. hydrophobic (oil-like) layer repels hydrophilic (water-like) layer [水嘅hydrogen bond太強, 油層嘅弱van der Waal's force打唔入]
3. wetting refers to ability of reduction of surface tension of interface [所謂surface tension微觀睇就係水嘅hydrogen bond做成嘅attractive force]
4. emulsifying refers to ability of breaking large grease into small oil droplets. This oil droplets can be stabilized by detergent molecule coating where hydrophilic head faces to water phase while hydrophobic tail inserts towards centre of oil droplets.

Ziegler Natta Catalyst
Catalysation of addition polymerization by reducing the activation energy, which is used to breaking the C=C bond, by coordination of C=C bond of monomers to the transition metal centre of the catalyst. 唔知會唔會答得太詳細

Molar mass
mass of one mole (6.02*10^23) of chemical formula of a substance, in g/mol

磚吓先
1 )Explain why trans isomers generally have a higher melting point than cis isomer
2) What can be observed at the end point of Mohr method? Write the chemical equation(s) which lead(s) to this observation.
